message:
test: add proptest regression seeds and subprocess bridge test script

Check in 3 proptest .proptest-regressions files so previously-found
failure cases are re-tested on every run:
- proptest_edit_distance
- proptest_shortest_path
- proptest_time_series

Add scripts/test_subprocess_bridge.sh (5-line shell script for
running subprocess bridge tests via rch).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc 1c46198b31dc95dcd759b6364e91846049d530df8f559c1a813adf79f4431e0b # shrinks to a = [0], b = [1]

@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc 2b7775462235cb1dfad7a83617c53434be88428993571dbef69ea2385f19e54b # shrinks to g = WeightedGraph { n: 2, adj: [[], []] }
+cc 305d6fa1cf7d6e4a4e7f97d0896705ffe2104bdbaba857a8012aab68638fe9cf # shrinks to g = WeightedGraph { n: 5, adj: [[], [], [], [], []] }, source = 4

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc edadd540fa521f7d5d4d2ab60ef0d1ffa62b020920c9a7ffd938ce0549c6adf3 # shrinks to t = 0, v = -444.09520515685364

@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenterm-core --features subprocess-bridge --lib subprocess_bridge -- --nocapture
+echo "PASS: SubprocessBridge tests complete"
